zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Toriton於1157年出生在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓時，她的父親William de Torrington II23歲，母親Baroness Mary of Torrington35歲。她於大約1193年與Sir Robert de Merton在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1228年在她的家鄉享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Toriton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tritton
meanings: English: locative name from Tretton (aias Tritton) in Tydd Saint Mary (Lincs). The surname in Kent may have a different origin, but no plausible alternative has been found.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Toriton was born in 1157, in Great Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Torrington II, was 23 and her mother, Baroness Mary of Torrington, was 35. She married Sir Robert de Merton about 1193, in Great Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1228, in her hometown, at the age of 71.

Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Merton environ 1193, à Great Torrington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1228, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Toritonが1157年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト トリントンで生まれた時，父William de Torrington IIは23歳，母Baroness Mary of Torringtonは35歳であった。約1193年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト トリントンでSir Robert de Mertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1228年に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Toriton(이)가 1157년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 토링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Torrington II(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Mary of Torrington(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1193년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 토링턴에서 Sir Robert de Merton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1228년 그녀의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Toriton родилась в 1157 г. в местности грит торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Torrington II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Mary of Torrington, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Merton около 1193 г. в местности грит торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1228 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 71 год.
